title: The Tangled Web
author: Tracy Sinclair
description:
It had all started with a phone call, an urgent message that sent Nicole Barrett racing off to save her kid sister. Suddenly Nicole was trapped in a plot to protect her sister from the wrath of one of San Francisco's wealthiest businessmen, Flint Lockridge.

The web of deception become hopelessly tangled when Nicole discovered that Flint was a dangerous man whose kind efforts were undermining all her plans. The man she was trying to deceive was nobody's fool...
